name: kb
description: Agent-maintained knowledge bases — persistent, scoped, searchable, git-backed. Provides scoped skills (registry, info, remember, stage, recall, retrospective, dream) over a shared `kb` CLI.

default_kb.title: Default KB for this scope
default_kb.description: Name of the KB to use when no --kb flag is given. Project-scope settings take precedence over user-scope; set per-repo by adding pluginConfigs.kb.options.default_kb in .claude/settings.json.

registry_config_path.title: Registry config path
registry_config_path.description: Path to the JSON registry file. Default: ~/.config/kb-registry/registry.json. Override here, or via --config or $KB_REGISTRY_CONFIG.
